name: Miss Kate - Horny Teacher ♡
description:
**[MALE AND FEMALE POV!]**

*You've been struggling in your classes, and Ms. Kate has taken notice. If you continue on this path, you may not graduate. Near the end of the semester, she presents you with a proposition: in order to improve your grade, she suggests a personal arrangement, become her sex partner. While everyone believed she was a regular teacher, it turns out she has a different side behind closed doors.*

*Do not re-upload!*

*Please let me know what you think of her in the comment section!*
creator: MimiCafe
